 ACOUSTICALLY TRANSPARENT MAGNETIC GRILLES - The included grilles not only give a class look to this speaker, but also deliver a NATURAL, UNCOLORED SOUND. The grille can be removed easily when you want to enjoy looking at them fully uncovered
